documentation.text:
@dev Sets the deployer (msg.sender) as the initial owner 
      due to the older Ownable that needs a constructor parameter.

typeDescriptions.typeString: literal_string "ProxyAdmin: new owner is the zero address"

arguments.value: ProxyAdmin: new owner is the zero address

argumentTypes.typeString: literal_string "ProxyAdmin: new owner is the zero address"
